case_title: HUANG, XIANG ET AL (SEE ATTACHMENT) et al VS ORIENT EXPRESS TRAVEL SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, XIANG  ET AL (SEE ATTACHMENT) MA, YANHUI ZHUQING, WANG MA, SHUYI CHOU, SHI YING MA, JINGJING MA, YINGYING GUAN, YILLA YEE, KAREN CHOW, ANNA GUO, SIMON LOO, BOHLING LOO, WANDA CHOW, JOHNNY CHAU, SUSAN CHAN, LICHI NEU, JEAN HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT ORIENT EXPRESS TRAVEL SERVICES WONG, DAVID : PRESIDENT CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-13-1996 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
NOTE:INITIALLY,17 PLTFS COULDNOT BE ENT'D(ONLY 10) AFTER W/C SYSTM STOPPED.THRFR,CASECREATED AT10 PLF S WHILE ADDL BEING PRGRMD,NEXT7COPIES FROM PLF CLM
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-15-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-06-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-06-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-09-1996 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
CONT.OF DEF.RSVD.TO SEPT. 10- AT 1:30PM;FILE WITH SAJJA.
APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANTS AT THEIR INSISTENCE (EVENTHOUGH THERE IS A DISMISSAL ON FILE) $71.00
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-15-1996, GRANTED
CONT.REQ OF DEF.RSVD.FOR AUG.06AT 3:30PM.REQSTD. 01:30 HEARING IS N O T AVAILABLE.
PLTFFS. REQUESTED CONTINUANCE TO 7-22-96 @ 6:30PM, SUE GRANTED CONT. TO 9-9-96 @ 6:30PM (PER HER) 'CAUSE WANTS ONLY THIS CASE FOR MON 6:30 CALENDAR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, XIANG  ET AL (SEE ATTACHMENT) MA, YANHUI ZHUQING, WANG MA, SHUYI CHOU, SHI YING MA, JINGJING MA, YINGYING GUAN, YILLA YEE, KAREN CHOW, ANNA GUO, SIMON LOO, BOHLING LOO, WANDA CHOW, JOHNNY CHAU, SUSAN CHAN, LICHI NEU, JEAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ORIENT EXPRESS TRAVEL SERVICES WONG, DAVID : PRESIDENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
BAUGHMAN & WANG, ATTORNEYS AT LAW, LETTER FROM STEVE BAUGHMAN ADDRESSED TO THE COMMISSIONER(IN BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF'S)FILED.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFEND. OPPOSING MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTFF.
SYSTEM NOT ABLE TO PRINT OUT CONTINUANCE; GIVEN TO SAJJA. HE LEFT MESSAGE FOR ARLENE.
DEFND'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. NOTICE TO DEF. DAVID WANG MAILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-09-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-13-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,550.00 FILED BY HUANG, XIANG  ET AL (SEE ATTACHMENT) MA, YANHUI ZHUQING, WANG MA, SHUYI CHOU, SHI YING MA, JINGJING MA, YINGYING GUAN, YILLA YEE, KAREN CHOW, ANNA GUO, SIMON LOO, BOHLING LOO, WANDA CHOW, JOHNNY CHAU, SUSAN CHAN, LICHI NEU, JEAN AS TO DEFENDANT ORIENT EXPRESS TRAVEL SERVICES WONG, DAVID : PRESIDENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1996 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANTS ORDERED DISMISSED IN SCA #24848 ON 1-16-97.
